task: Insert the pencil into the pencil sharpener
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A red pencil lies on a white cloth surface. A black pencil sharpener is positioned on the cloth, with a visible slot for inserting the pencil. The pencil is rigid and slender, the sharpener has a distinct slot for insertion. STRATEGY - First, grasp the pencil to pick it up. Then, transport it to the sharpener. Finally, insert the pencil into the sharpener's slot. Failure modes include dropping the pencil during transport or misaligning it with the sharpener's slot. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Grasp the pencil at its body for a secure hold. Step 2: Transport the pencil to the sharpener's slot. Step 3: Insert the pencil into the sharpener's slot.**
Goal: inserted(pencil, sharpener)
Scene: pencil, sharpener, cloth
Step 1: grasp(pencil)
  affordance_region: the body of the red pencil
  contact: holding(pencil) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pencil)
Step 2: transport(pencil -> sharpener)
  affordance_region: the slot of the black pencil sharpener
  spatial: above(pencil, sharpener_slot, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pencil)
  done_when: above(pencil, sharpener_slot, 0.05)
Step 3: insert(pencil -> sharpener)
  affordance_region: the slot of the black pencil sharpener
  contact: inserted(pencil, sharpener) [completion]
  pose: aligned(pencil, sharpener_slot) [completion]
  done_when: inserted(pencil, sharpener)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red pencil
the slot of the black pencil sharpener
the slot of the black pencil sharpener
